tasks.title: Scale sigma1-postgres CloudNative-PG cluster to 3 replicas
subtasks: Modify the CloudNative-PG Cluster Custom Resource (CR) for 'sigma1-postgres' to set 'instances: 3'.
Monitor the cluster for successful scaling and replica synchronization.

tasks.title: Enable PgBouncer connection pooling for sigma1-postgres
subtasks: Integrate PgBouncer with the CloudNative-PG cluster, potentially as a sidecar or a separate deployment.
Configure PgBouncer to manage connections to the 'sigma1-postgres' cluster.
Update application connection strings to use PgBouncer.

tasks.title: Configure automated backups for sigma1-postgres
subtasks: Configure a CloudNative-PG Backup Custom Resource (CR) for daily backups of 'sigma1-postgres' to S3.
Enable Write-Ahead Log (WAL) archiving to S3 for point-in-time recovery.
Verify backup and restore procedures.

tasks.title: Enable Redis Sentinel with 3 replicas for sigma1-valkey
subtasks: Modify the Redis/Valkey Custom Resource (CR) for 'sigma1-valkey' to enable Sentinel mode.
Configure the CR to provision 3 Redis/Valkey replicas and 3 Sentinel instances.
Verify the Sentinel cluster is healthy and monitoring the Redis/Valkey instances.

tasks.title: Configure maxmemory policy for sigma1-valkey
subtasks: Update the Redis/Valkey Custom Resource (CR) for 'sigma1-valkey' to set an appropriate 'maxmemory' limit.
Configure a 'maxmemory-policy' (e.g., 'allkeys-lru', 'noeviction') based on application requirements.
Monitor Redis/Valkey memory usage and eviction behavior.

tasks.title: Implement TLS certificates for services via cert-manager
subtasks: Configure ClusterIssuers or Issuers (e.g., Let's Encrypt) within cert-manager.
Create Certificate resources for all exposed application services requiring TLS.
Ensure certificates are automatically renewed and correctly mounted by services.

tasks.title: Configure CDN (Cloudflare) for static assets
subtasks: Configure Cloudflare DNS records for static asset domains.
Set up CNAMEs to point to the origin server for static assets.
Configure caching rules, edge caching, and Web Application Firewall (WAF) policies in Cloudflare for static asset delivery.

tasks.title: Refine Network Policies to restrict pod-to-pod traffic
subtasks: Analyze application communication patterns and dependencies within the 'sigma1' namespace.
Create granular Network Policies to enforce least privilege for pod-to-pod and namespace-to-namespace traffic.
Test network policies to ensure only authorized communication paths are open.
